snippets.comment: farnhams def the funniest and most laid back professor i ever had. although he would spend a little too much lecture time on proofs, he explains and answers questions incredibly well. decent amount of hw but super fair on deadlines and exam content. hes a really silly guy who makes calculus fun and

sometimes wont show up to office hours, but when he does he is very helpful; teaches more theory than examples (there were large lengths when i would zone out and not miss anything significant); he is very passionate about math; textbook required but easily pirated; attendance not mandatory but you'

he's passionate and his lectures are great. this can be a heavy class if u dont pace urself and study properly. lots of hw, 1 quiz every week, 4 exams total. quizzes based on hw, exams are fair and hard, but manageable. ask him questions, understand the material, and u will do fine
